CopyProductToken.note: When dependent op needs 'CopyProductToken' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_provisioned_product_plans and set CopyProductToken='{{ item.TargetProductId }}'

Id.note: When dependent op needs 'Id' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_tag_options and set Id='{{ item.Active }}'

PortfolioId.note: When dependent op needs 'PortfolioId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_portfolios and set PortfolioId='{{ item.PortfolioShareDetails }}'

ProductId.note: When dependent op needs 'ProductId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_accepted_portfolio_shares and set ProductId='{{ item.ARN }}'

ProvisionedProductId.note: When dependent op needs 'ProvisionedProductId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_stack_instances_for_provisioned_product and set ProvisionedProductId='{{ item.Account }}'

ResourceId.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_budgets_for_resource and set ResourceId='{{ item.BudgetName }}'

ServiceActionId.note: When dependent op needs 'ServiceActionId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_provisioning_artifacts_for_service_action and set ServiceActionId='{{ item.ProvisioningArtifact }}'

PlanId.note: When dependent op needs 'PlanId' param, use for_each=aws.servicecatalog.list_provisioned_product_plans and set PlanId='{{ item.PlanId }}'
